response.justification: Aisha brings solid TypeScript/Node.js depth and over 15 years of software engineering breadth, with recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years of production-grade AI experience, and the candidate's AI work appears limited to roughly one month at the current employer. Python — a core listed language — is absent from the skills section and entire employment history. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, which are central to the role's day-to-day responsibilities.
strengths: Staff-level seniority established across multiple organizations with TypeScript, Node.js, and full-stack delivery
Hands-on work with Model Context Protocol servers and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
AWS CDK usage at Optilyz and demonstrated ability to build and ship data-driven platforms at scale
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list and all employment history, despite being a primary language requirement
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or optimization techniques anywhere in the resume
AI/agentic experience is limited to approximately one month at the current role — far below the 8-year minimum required

key_factors.factor: No RAG or vector DB experience
